features: Moisturizes baby skin and helps protect from dryness
Pure mineral oil forms a silky barrier to help prevent excess moisture loss
Great for baby massage and parent-baby bonding
Clinically proven mild and gentle formula for your baby's skin
description: Product Description Johnsons pure & gentle daily care baby oil is specially formulated to moisturize babies' delicate skin and protect skin from dryness, great for relieving dry skin or rough patches. Pure baby mineral oil forms a silky moisturizing barrier to help prevent excess moisture loss and lock in up to 10 times more moisture on wet skin. Johnsons baby oil is clinically proven to be gentle and mild for baby's skin, easy to spread, ideal for baby massage. It is hypoallergenic and dermatologist-tested baby oil contains no parabens or phthalates. Ingredients Mineral oil, fragrance, aloe barbadensis leaf extract, tocopheryl acetate (vitamin E), water Directions Gently massage onto damp skin after bathing to leave skin feeling baby soft and to moisturize dry skin. Works best on damp, not dry skin. Safety Warning Johnsons Baby Oil Regular 200ml Box Contains baby oil Manufacturer Contact Information GB: Johnson & Johnson Ltd. 50-100 Holmers Farm Way High Wycombe HP12 4EG UK IE: Johnson & Johnson GmbH Platz 2.
